event.description: The grand doors swing open to reveal a vast throne room. Massive stone pillars line the hall, their torches blazing with golden light. At the far end, upon a throne of obsidian and gold, sits the Dragon King in human form — ancient, powerful, and waiting. His eyes burn with cold fire. There is no retreat.

choices.label: Charge with your blade
choices.successText: With a mighty blow, you shatter the Dragon King's dark crown! He roars in defeat as his power crumbles. The castle is yours — the dungeon is conquered!
choices.failText: The Dragon King catches your blade mid-swing and hurls you against the pillars. Your body aches from the impact.

choices.label: Cast a binding spell
choices.successText: You weave an ancient incantation. Chains of light erupt from the floor, binding the Dragon King to his throne. His power shatters — the dungeon is conquered!
choices.failText: The Dragon King's magic overwhelms your spell. Dark energy sears through your mind.

choices.label: Strike from the shadows
choices.successText: You vanish into the pillar shadows and reappear behind the throne. Your dagger finds the gap in his armor — the Dragon King falls. The dungeon is conquered!
choices.failText: The Dragon King's burning eyes track you through the darkness. A wave of flame catches you mid-step.
